storyboard.title: Core Value
storyboard.user_question_answered: What does this extension do in one sentence?
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Keep first name, email, phone, country, and notes ready in the popup.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Real popup UI only. Do not show unsupported sync or team features.

storyboard.title: Real Workflow
storyboard.user_question_answered: How fast is the core action?
storyboard.overlay_headline: Fill the current page in one click.
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Run it from the popup only when you are on a real lead form.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Show a real form page and keep the claim to visible supported fields.

storyboard.title: Clean Result
storyboard.user_question_answered: What result should I expect after using it?
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Text, email, phone, textarea, and select fields match the saved profile.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Must stay tied to the actual browser-smoke scenario.

storyboard.title: Smart Safeguards
storyboard.user_question_answered: What safeguards keep the fill action controlled?
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Readonly and disabled fields are skipped. Existing values stay unchanged by default.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Do not imply background automation or unsupported overwrite rules.

storyboard.title: Local Trust
storyboard.user_question_answered: Why is this safer than a broader workflow tool?
storyboard.overlay_headline: Local-only. No account. No cloud sync.
storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Profile data stays in Chrome storage and runs only after a user click.
storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Only use claims that match the real storage and network behavior.
